Prefix Verb     URI Pattern                                Controller#Action
root GET        /                                          home#index
admin_posts GET /admin/posts(.:format)                     admin/posts#index
            POST /admin/posts(.:format)                    admin/posts#create
admin_post GET  /admin/posts/:id(.:format)                 admin/posts#show
edit_admin_post GET /admin/posts/:id/edit(.:format)        admin/posts#edit
publish_admin_post PATCH /admin/posts/:id/publish(.:format) admin/posts#publish
search_admin_posts GET /admin/posts/search(.:format)       admin/posts#search
post_comments GET /posts/:post_id/comments(.:format)       comments#index
post_comment GET /posts/:post_id/comments/:id(.:format)    comments#show
preview_post GET|POST /posts/:id/preview(.:format)         posts#preview
optional_report GET /reports(/:year)(/:month)(.:format)    reports#show
asset GET       /assets/*path(.:format)                    assets#show
health GET      /up(.:format)                              rails/health#show
sidekiq         /sidekiq                                   Sidekiq::Web
legacy_redirect GET /legacy(.:format)                      redirect(301, /new)
duplicate GET   /duplicate/:id(.:format)                   duplicates#show
duplicate POST  /duplicate(.:format)                       duplicates#create
rails_mailers GET /rails/mailers(.:format)                 rails/mailers#index
